raw_transcript: please update the JIRA ticket with the latest status
geval_criteria_augment: OUTPUT must be plain text only: no markdown headings, bold, code fences, or bullet lists. INPUT is already clear: score 1.0 if ACTUAL OUTPUT keeps the same meaning with at most sentence case and/or terminal punctuation (e.g. adding a period). Do not fail for near-verbatim output or 'does not add value'.
